Observer Ward is an item purchasable at the Base Shop, under Consumables.

Observer Ward
A form of half-sentient plant, often cultivated by apprentice wizards.
Consumables
Cost 0
Sell Value -  / Count
Stacks NO LIMIT / Inventory Slot
Stock 2 INIT / 4 MAX
135
Active Plant
Charges 1 INIT
Bonus ?
Shareable 1
Usage Alert ? 0
Recipe


Additional Information

[edit]
  • Stacks with itself and with Sentry Wards in a single inventory slot, there is no stack limit. The sell value adapts based on the number of instances in a stack.
    • Wards from multiple players are combined when given by allies.
  • Observer Wards do not provide True Sight.
  • Killing an Observer Ward prints out a chat notification to allies.
  • Observer Ward's vision is considered team vision, and is not bound to the player that placed the ward.
    • This means if that player has their vision limited to themselves, wards placed by them do not grant them vision.

Bounty Interactions

[edit]

Grants Gold bounty to the player that provided the True Sight as follows:

Gem of True Sight
  • To the player who bought or wield the item (regardless of its original buyer).
Sentry Ward
  • To the player who bought the wards or Planted the ward (regardless of its original buyer).
Book of the Dead
  • To the player who owns the Level 3 Necronomicon Warrior.

Lightning Bolt, Thundergod's Wrath or Rocket Flare

  • To the caster of the ability (regardless of the original hero).

True Sight, Chronosphere, Kinetic Field or Aether Remnant

  • To the player that kills the ward.

Ability

[edit]

Plant

[edit]
Plant
▶️
Ability
Area
Affects
Self
Plants an invisible and phased Observer Ward at the target location, which grants ground vision around it.
Cast Animation: 0 + 0
Cast Range: 500
Vision Radius: 1600
Ward Duration: 360
Holding the CTRL allows Plant to be cast on an allied hero, sharing an Observer Ward with them, using the item's cast range.
As the match goes on, Observer Wards become more and more valuable. Their gold and experience bounties scale with elapsed game time.
Gold Bounty Increase per Minute: 4
Experience Bounty Increase per Minute: 8
The ward takes a fixed amount of attacks to be destroyed. Creeps take more attacks than heroes, treats Illusions and Creep-Heroes as creeps.
Hero Hit Count: 2
Non-Hero Hit Count: 10
Attacks against Observer Wards cannot miss. Melee units have an increased attack range when attacking Observer Wards.
Attacker Accuracy: 100%
Melee Attack Range Bonus: 150
The player that placed the ward can always attack it with any of their units. However, all their attacks are treated as non-hero attacks, until the ward comes within the 50% deny range.

70
100 (x̄)
  • Cannot be placed in the following areas:
    • Fountain areas, including the ramp.
    • Roshan's pits.
    • Within the bound radius of buildings and trees.
    • On impassable terrain.
    • Within 300 range of another Observer Ward that has been placed by an ally within the last 1 second.
  • The Ward's bounty increases by 1 every 15 seconds, and the experience by 1 every 7.5 seconds.
modifier_item_buff_ward
Observer Ward
  • Has two cast modes:
    • Regular cast, can only target the ground.
      • In this mode, the targeting cursor depicts the ward model, with arrows pointing at it, along with the following indicators:
        • The vision radius the ward would cover if placed at the current location.
          • Also displays a blue mask within that area, that shows the actual area covered by the vision.
          • Also displays a yellow mask on the minimap, that shows the actual area covered by the vision.
        • The vision radius of allied Observer Wards, in green.
          • Also displays a blue mask within that area, that shows the actual area their vision covers.
          • Also displays a yellow mask on the minimap, that shows the actual area their vision covers.
        • The True Sight radius of allied Towers, in green.
        • The True Sight radius of visible enemy Towers, in red.
        • The vision radius of all Watchers, in green, regardless of alliance.
        • The spawn boxes of neutral creep camps, in yellow, turning red when the cursor is within the spawn box.
    • CTRL cast, can only target allied heroes.
      • Cannot target allied Illusions, Clones, Couriers or the Spirit Bear.
      • However, regular sharing by dragging them item onto them works.
  • Selecting a placed allied Observer Ward shows the name of the player that placed the ward, right below the health bar.
  • Destroying an enemy Observer Ward prints out a chat notification to allies.

Lore

[edit]
  • Knowing how to craft a ward is an important skill for artificers of magical goods. Rylai showed great talent at crafting wards, and once considered becoming an artificer.[1]
  • Despite this, the flavor text for this item refers to Observer Wards as plants and states that they are "often cultivated by apprentice wizards." This implies that they are grown as opposed to crafted, directly contradicting the White Sentry's description.

Trivia

[edit]
  • In DotA, this item's name is pluralized to Observer Wards.

Description
7.40
(2025-12-15)
  • Plant
    • Can no longer be placed within a 300 radius of another Observer Ward planted by an ally within the last 1 second. [?]
    • Cast range is no longer affected by cast range bonuses.
7.36b
(2024-06-05)
  • Observer Wards' vision is now considered team vision, and not attributed to the player that placed the ward. [?]
7.33c
(2023-05-13)
  • Increased base experience bounty from 50 to 70 .
  • Increased experience bounty per minute from 6 to 8 .
